name: kafka-stream-filter-trigger
title: Filter Kafka Stream
description: Consumes messages from a Kafka topic and fires the flow only for messages that satisfy the configured predicate(s). Supports single-predicate and multi-predicate AND/OR evaluation, opt-in deduplication, and opt-in rate limiting. The trigger owns its Kafka transport (consumer group) — no separate Kafka trigger is needed.

display.description: Fire a flow when a Kafka message matches a field predicate.

display.name: Kafka Connection
display.description: TIBCO Kafka shared connection providing broker addresses, authentication, and TLS settings.

display.name: Topic
display.description: Kafka topic to consume messages from.

display.name: Consumer Group
display.description: Kafka consumer group ID. Each trigger instance in the same group shares partition load.

display.name: Initial Offset
display.description: Where to start consuming when no committed offset exists for this consumer group.

display.name: Default Operator
display.description: Default comparison operator used when handler 'operator' is not set.

display.name: Default Predicate Mode
display.description: 'and': all predicates must pass. 'or': at least one must pass.

display.name: Pass Through on Missing Field
display.description: When true, messages where the filter field is absent are treated as passing.

display.name: Enable Deduplication
display.description: When true, duplicate messages are suppressed using the handler-level 'dedupField' as the unique event ID.

display.name: Dedup Window
display.description: How long to remember seen event IDs. Go duration string e.g. '10m', '1h'.

display.name: Dedup Max Entries
display.description: Maximum number of event IDs to track in memory. 0 = 100 000.

display.name: Rate Limit (msgs/sec)
display.description: Maximum messages per second accepted. 0 = disabled.

display.name: Rate Limit Burst
display.description: Token bucket burst size. 0 = same value as rateLimitRPS.

display.name: Rate Limit Mode
display.description: 'drop': exceeded messages are dropped immediately and the Kafka offset is permanently advanced — dropped messages are NOT redelivered even when commitOnSuccess=true (at-most-once semantics for rate-limited messages). 'wait': block up to rateLimitMaxWaitMs for a token before processing.

display.name: Rate Limit Max Wait (ms)
display.description: Maximum wait time in milliseconds when rateLimitMode=wait.

display.name: Balance Strategy
display.description: Kafka consumer group rebalance strategy. 'roundrobin' (default) — simple round-robin partition assignment. 'sticky' — minimises partition reassignments on rebalance. 'range' — assigns contiguous partition ranges per consumer.

display.name: Commit Offset on Success Only
display.description: When true (default), the Kafka offset is committed only when all pass-handlers complete without error — the message is redelivered on flow failure (at-least-once). When false, the offset is always committed regardless of handler result (at-most-once).

display.name: Handler Timeout (ms)
display.description: Maximum time in milliseconds allowed for all handlers to complete for a single message. 0 (default) means no timeout. When exceeded the handler is treated as failed and, if Commit Offset on Success Only is true, the offset is not marked.

display.name: Dedup Persist Path
display.description: File path for gob-encoded dedup state snapshots. Persists seen event IDs across restarts so duplicates are still suppressed after a restart. Leave empty to disable. Only active when enableDedup is true.

display.name: Dedup Persist Every N Messages
display.description: Save dedup state every N messages. 0 = persist only on graceful shutdown.

display.name: Event Type
display.description: 'pass' (default): fires when the predicate evaluates to true. 'evalError': fires when predicate evaluation fails — use for dead-letter routing. 'all': fires for both.

display.name: Field
display.description: Message field to evaluate in single-predicate mode. Leave empty to use multi-predicate mode via 'predicates'.

display.name: Operator
display.description: Comparison operator for single-predicate mode. Overrides the trigger-level 'operator' default.

display.name: Value
display.description: Comparison value for single-predicate mode.

display.name: Predicates (JSON)
display.description: Multi-predicate definition as a JSON array. E.g. [{"field":"status","operator":"eq","value":"200"},{"field":"region","operator":"eq","value":"us-east"}]

display.name: Predicate Mode
display.description: Overrides the trigger-level predicateMode for this handler. 'and' | 'or'.

display.name: Dedup Field
display.description: The message field whose value is used as the unique event ID for deduplication. Only active when trigger-level 'enableDedup' is true.
